full_text:
Zhu (Shuxian)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu, styledShuxian, was born in Guanghan. Executed for plotting to surrender to Liu Bei’s besieging forces. His wife would soon follow him to the afterlife. Zhu was affiliated with Liu Zhang. Zhu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
